name: get_site_uptime
title: Get Site Uptime & Incidents
description: Returns recent uptime checks and downtime incidents for a specific site. Includes response times, status codes, and a summary of recent outages with their duration.

site_id.description: The numeric ID of the site, obtained from list_sites.

days.description: How many days of history to return. Defaults to 7. Maximum 90.
